steps.title: Recognize the standard form of a circle equation
steps.content: The given equation $(x + 4)^2 + (y + 8)^2 = 169$ matches the standard form $(x - h)^2 + (y - k)^2 = r^2$. In this form, the right side always equals $r^2$, so we can immediately identify that $r^2 = 169$.

steps.title: Solve for the radius
steps.content: Take the square root of both sides to isolate $r$: $$r = \sqrt{169} = 13$$
